proposal_summary: This proposal requests to allocate 200,000 ENS from the ENS treasury to the Protocol Guild pilot program, transferring the funds to a 1-year vesting contract (0xF29Ff96aaEa6C9A1fBa851f74737f3c069d4f1a9) to reward Ethereum core protocol contributors.

disclosed_entities.name: ENS
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We propose that 200k ENS (~3.7% of the unclaimed airdrop) be allocated in recognition of past and ongoing work

claimed_actions.raw_action: send 200k ENS to the Pilot vesting contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund Protocol Guild pilot with 200,000 ENS
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: We are proposing that 200k ENS... be sent to the Pilot vesting contract deployed at 0xF29…f1a9

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires a standard ERC20 transfer of 200,000 ENS tokens from the ENS treasury to a specified vesting contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: We propose that 200k ENS... be sent to the Pilot vesting contract

limitations: No precise function signatures or full payload data provided in the text for the execution.
